programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: High-stakes tournament poker from some of the world's famous casinos and card rooms.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Series following members of the M-Sport WRC team about the trials and tribulations of competing in Rally driving at the highest level.

programme.title: Endurance Uncovered: Racing for Excellence
programme.desc: A special look at the World Endurance Championship, a global series of races that test the limits of both drivers and vehicles.

programme.title: What I Wore
programme.desc: Real Madrid legend Michel Salgado describes his passion for football via the shirts which have defined his life.

programme.title: What I Wore
programme.desc: Former France and Arsenal player Emmanuel Petit talks about some of his favourite classic football shirts.

programme.title: MotoGP Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Germany.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The fascinating backstory behind the famous/infamous 1988 "Catholics vs. Convicts" college football game between Notre Dame and the University of Miami. The slogan summarized the subtext of cultural and racial tensions brewing between the schools.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 18 Sooners (6-2, 2-2 SEC) seek revenge against the No. 14 Volunteers (6-2, 3-2). Tennessee topped Oklahoma 25-15 in 2024 in their first meeting as SEC rivals. The Vols are second among FBS programs in scoring at 45.6 points per game.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 11 Sooners (7-2, 3-2 SEC) visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (8-1, 6-0) in this marquee matchup. Alabama has won eight straight after burying LSU, 20-9 out of its bye Nov. 8. Oklahoma shocked then-No. 14 Tennessee 33-27 before its week off Nov. 1.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 8 Sooners take on the No. 22 Tigers. Oklahoma leads the all-time rivalry series 67-25-5, but Missouri won the first meeting as SEC equals in 2024. Oklahoma has defeated then-No. 14 Tennessee and then-No. 4 Alabama on the road in November.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 8 Sooners (9-2, 5-2 SEC) surge into a regular-season finale with the Tigers (7-4, 3-4). Oklahoma has won three straight games, all against Top 25 teams, and would all but assure itself a spot in the College Football Playoff by beating LSU.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: North Carolina State, coached by Jim Valvano, was a huge underdog in the 1983 NCAA Final vs. top-ranked Houston - resulting in one of the greatest college basketball upsets ever.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.desc: From Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas.

programme.desc: Basketball action from the NBA Summer League.

programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Live: NBA Summer League Basketball
programme.desc: From Cox Pavilion in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: Gotham FC takes on Washington Spirit in the Queens Classic at Citi Field. This match marks the first women's pro sports event at the venue and serves as a rematch of the 2025 NWSL championship. Washington are third in the NWSL while Gotham is fourth.

programme.title: Pirates Classics
programme.desc: A Pirates Classic game featuring big hits from David Parker and Willie Stargell, from July 11th, 1979.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Jazz musician Elan Trotman hooks up with America's Mad Fisherman Charlie Moore; Charlie interviews Elan and fishes with Elan on Lake Winnipesaukee; it is Elan's first time freshwater fishing; Charlie interviews Elan.

programme.title: Charlie Moore: No Offense
programme.desc: A trip to Nashville, Tennessee, with a meet and greet with musician and star of America's Got Talent Dave Fenley. Dave talks to Charlie about his career. Charlie and Dave visit Carter's Vintage Guitars. Charlie attends Dave's concert.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Diggin' Deep
programme.desc: In-depth interviews with former and current MLB players, coaches, and executives.

programme.desc: From February 7, 2001.

programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: The Snap Count with Charlie Batch and Trai Essex
Pirates Classics
programme.desc: From July 15, 1979.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Live: Wednesday At The Open
programme.desc: As Birkdale gets set for its 11th staging of the Open Championship - the last coming in 2017 - join some of the game's leading stars and pundits for a preview on the eve of the tournament.

programme.title: Live The Open: At The Range
programme.desc: Ahead of the 154th Open Championship, join some of the game's leading stars and pundits live from the practice range of this year's venue - Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: ICC Men's T20 WC: ENG v AUS 2010
programme.desc: Over the years, the ICC Men's T20 World Cup has thrown up a host of classic encounters. Here, revisit England's victorious 2010 final against old rivals Australia.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: MLB Home Run Derby in 30
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 MLB Home Run Derby.

programme.title: Live: 2026 MLB All-Star Game
programme.desc: The 96th Major League Baseball All-Star Game gets underway at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia. First baseman Freddie Freeman of the National League All-Stars goes up against first baseman Nick Kurtz, who replaced Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: MLB's Top 100
programme.desc: Counting down the top 100 plays from the past year in the MLB.

programme.title: Live: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: Sportsnet Central
programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: 2026 MLB All-Star Game
programme.desc: The 96th Major League Baseball All-Star Game gets underway at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia. First baseman Freddie Freeman of the National League All-Stars goes up against first baseman Nick Kurtz, who replaced Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

programme.title: MLB's Top 100
programme.desc: Counting down the top 100 plays from the past year in the MLB.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Blue Jays Classics
programme.desc: World Series, Game 3. From Oct. 20, 1992.

programme.title: MLB Home Run Derby in 30
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 MLB Home Run Derby.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: After a season away, Jason Koon is back on "High Stakes Poker"; Farah Galfond and Matt Berkey make their debut in this $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em cash game.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: After two seasons away, businessman Brandon Steven is back; Bobo Chann and Justin Gavri make their "High Stakes Poker" debut in this $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em cash game.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: Jean-Robert Bellande goes on a heater after making a big fold against Rick Salomon; Rick coolers Jean-Robert Bellande and Brandon Steven to rocket his chip stack to over $900K.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: MLB All-Star Game in 30
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 MLB All-Star Game.

programme.title: World's Strongest Man
programme.desc: Athletes compete for the title of world's strongest man.

programme.title: High Stakes Poker
programme.desc: Rick Salomon runs hotter than the sun, cracking pocket kings twice in a single session; Bobo Chann's luck heads south after clashing with Oscar-nominated actress Jennifer Tilly.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts for Osceola Turkeys in Florida with Janis Putelis and Richard Martinez.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve joins Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell for a spearfishing adventure in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: Colbi Geis travels to remote Canada in search of a musk ox with nothing but his Hoyt bow in hand.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve hunts for Osceola Turkeys in Florida with Janis Putelis and Richard Martinez.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve joins Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell for a spearfishing adventure in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: Colbi Geis travels to remote Canada in search of a musk ox with nothing but his Hoyt bow in hand.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Tyler Weaver & Kenneth Lancaster return to the Brooks Range of Alaska, on a DIY caribou hunt.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: Fred Eichler takes viewers on thrilling bow and predator hunts, showcasing the complete field-to-table lifestyle alongside family, friends, and clients. As the host, Fred shares the daily trials of ranching, farming, and managing an outfitting business in Colorado. Expect extreme bowhunting and predator action, intertwined with the ups and downs of their authentic field-to-table journey.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Hoge Wild
programme.desc: Hoge Wild is an exhilarating adventure TV series that follows the charismatic country music artist and host, Lucas Hoge, as he embarks on thrilling escapades around the world. With a passion for music, hunting, fishing, and scuba diving, Lucas Hoge brings a unique blend of talents to the screen. Viewers are taken on a wild ride as Lucas explores diverse landscapes, from rugged mountains to crystal

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: River Klass goes behind the scenes at the rodeo called the "Daddy of 'em All.".

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Tanner Smedley heads to Wyoming for a waterfowl hunt in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Travel along with the Savage Outdoors crew as they travel North America on some of the most intense big game hunting adventures ever caught on film!

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking and hunting in Nepal.

programme.title: Rooster Tales
programme.desc: Rooster Tales takes viewers on exciting upland bird hunting adventures across North America in search of wild birds in wild places. Host Travis Frank shares stories from the field about passionate bird hunters, bird dogs, habitat conservation, and DIY bird hunts on public land.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Fred Zink joins Kevin VanDam and his boys on the banks of the Neosho River in Kansas in the heart of the Central Flyway for a waterfowl experience that rekindles the values and the good that comes from spending time outdoors.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Pete Roberts is the visionary behind Origin USA, a company uncompromising in its promise to produce 100% American made products; to keep his promise, Pete must challenge the idea that manufacturing must be done overseas.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: A team of God-loving individuals, from different walks of life, different backgrounds and different jobs that all share one common bond: The passion and desire to achieve their Whitetail Fix!

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: It's the bear opener in Minnesota and Buddy Toepfer has waited five years for the chance to shoot a big one; Buddy's got a buddy who just happens to have a bear or two on his property.

programme.title: WildFed
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt, then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on the water, fishing off the coast of South Carolina for the number one seafood in America.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild, exciting adventures.

programme.title: Dirt Trax TV
programme.desc: The guys head to Hatfield McCoy for a little business retreat while also riding Big Coal River and Braveheart trail systems.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons
programme.desc: NASCAR O Reilly Auto Parts Series driver Jeb Burton and his father, NASCAR legend Ward Burton, take viewers beyond the checkered flag in Crossroads with the Burtons, where the excitement of racing meets a lifelong passion for hunting, conservation and the great outdoors.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase Anthony as he travels across North America pursuing one of the continent's greatest hunting challenges - the North American 29. From remote mountains to unforgiving backcountry, every hunt pushes physical limits, patience and determination. Along the way, the series captures the adventure, wildlife, landscapes and stories that come with a life dedicated to the outdoors.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In Colorado, King partners with RSI Outdoors' owner, Tarry Bratton, and visits HARTEIS RANCH with Freddy, harvesting his first Colorado antelope.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: More than three decades after the Vietnam War, when the totals of modern American snipers were added up, it was discovered that one man had 103 confirmed kills and as many as 216 probable kills, more than any other Marine Corps sniper; host Joe Mantegna explores the life and accomplishments of Chuck Mawhinney.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: Our editors discuss the Springfield Armory Echelon Alpha.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: A hunting show for EVERYONE! Come enjoy our fast-paced and upbeat hunting show. Follow along with hosts Brandon Jennings, Sean Lundy, and John O'Dell as we travel all over the globe hunting multiple species, attempt to educate and entertain our viewers and focus on the one thing that matters most... Family.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In a classic western, Clint Eastwood -- aka Blondie -- saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from; recreating each scene and testing the reality of those shots.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Early season food sources come into play in two different states as the Illinois and Iowa deer season rolls in.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel—it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Winchester Deadly Passion is a show that will keep the viewer on the edge of their seat with hardcore style hunting mixed with Melissa's genuine and fun-loving personality.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve goes spearfishing with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts to target Amberjack season.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve goes on a solo hunt with his muzzleloader.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Travis Price travels to British Columbia and flies into the backcountry to hunt for big moose and mountain goats.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up-close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Live: Baseball Night in N.Y.
programme.desc: A cast of leading New York baseball writers and other experts to discuss the latest off-season news involving the Mets, Yankees, and key division rivals.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Obscure stories in New York sports from 1970.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the year of 1971.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York Sports from 1972.

programme.title: Canyon of Heroes
programme.desc: An original SNY documentary that looks into the unique history of New York City's ticker-tape parades as they celebrated along Broadway, focusing on the major championship celebrations in 1994 and 1986.

programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Mets Classics
programme.desc: From May 23, 2009. Omir-acle Mets win.

programme.title: Live: The Carton Show with Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle
programme.desc: Craig Carton & Chris McMonigle take on major sports storylines featuring heated debates and strong, often controversial, opinions.

programme.title: NRL Women's Premiership

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: Arkansas Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Fort Smith hosts Pradco Outdoors creating lures which make great fishing memories. We tour and test the products! And Leigh's bluegrass tour continues.

programme.title: Fishing the Midwest
programme.desc: Lake Oahe and Lake Sharpe produce outstanding summer walleye fishing on this episode of Fishing the Midwest.

programme.title: Angling Edge Adventures
programme.desc: Angling Edge Adventures puts destination fishing front and center, traveling to world-class waters across the Midwest and Canada. Hosted by the Lindner team, each episode highlights outstanding fisheries while showing anglers how to break down new water and capitalize on peak seasonal opportunities. Grounded in the proven Angling Edge approach, the series blends travel, exploration, and real-world

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Dave hunts for giant smallmouth on the St. Lawrence River, but he's fishing a bite that most people avoid.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Trolling for Lake Michigan trout and salmon at Sturgeon Bay, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Beau & Walker on an adventure they will never forget catching Specs & Bass out of Highland Park Fish Camp in DeLand, Florida.

programme.title: National Walleye Tour
programme.desc: National Walleye Tour anglers take on Lake Huron in Alpena, Michigan for the third stop of the season! Tune in to see which Pros & Co-Anglers take top honors.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.desc: Angling Edge Adventures puts destination fishing front and center, traveling to world-class waters across the Midwest and Canada. Hosted by the Lindner team, each episode highlights outstanding fisheries while showing anglers how to break down new water and capitalize on peak seasonal opportunities. Grounded in the proven Angling Edge approach, the series blends travel, exploration, and real-world

programme.title: Facts of Fishing
programme.desc: Dave hunts for giant smallmouth on the St. Lawrence River, but he's fishing a bite that most people avoid.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Trolling for Lake Michigan trout and salmon at Sturgeon Bay, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Beau & Walker on an adventure they will never forget catching Specs & Bass out of Highland Park Fish Camp in DeLand, Florida.

programme.title: National Walleye Tour
programme.desc: National Walleye Tour anglers take on Lake Huron in Alpena, Michigan for the third stop of the season! Tune in to see which Pros & Co-Anglers take top honors.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: The first-ever AWWS NXT Pro Guide Walleye Series on Lake Mille Lacs, MN.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: By sea, or by land, wading or boating; when it comes to chasing the silver ghosts of the flats, the method depends on the day and conditions, and other times it's strictly personal preference.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Come along on this fun fishing adventure with Bill and country singer-songwriter Stephanie Quayle.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Jump in with Bill and his guest, Rex Nelson from KastKing as they search for lunkers in some very clear water.
